texto: The world is full of fools and foolishness
autor: the mission of every clever man is to watch the fools from a distance and develop sound plans to repair the damages created by them!
explicacao: Citação de the mission of every clever man is to watch the fools from a distance and develop sound plans to repair the damages created by them! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The world is full of fools and foolishness” articula reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, world em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
